name: Pork with Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into small bite-size cubes and place in a frying pan with 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil.
2. Remove any residue from the pan, cover tightly, and simmer for an hour.
3. Place the chestnuts into a large pan with enough water to cover. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for an hour.
4. Drain the chestnuts and add them to the pork meat along with the soy sauce, sherry, and dark brown sugar. Cook slowly for an additional 25 minutes.
5. Wash the spinach thoroughly and drain. Place into a frying pan or wok along with 1 tablespoon of the liquid from the pork and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil.
6. Set heat to high and cook for approximately 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
7. Place the spinach on top of the pork and pour the juices over the top.
8. Serve hot.
